channel.title: Posts on sasta sundar tikau
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on sasta sundar tikau

item.title: Every Saint Was First a Scandal — Kabir. Bulleh Shah. Ibn Arabi. Nusrat.
item.description: They crossed the hardest boundary in their tradition. Got rejected, accused, cut off. Then they died — and everyone claimed them.

item.title: The Rewrite Is Dead. Long Live the Rewrite.
item.description: How AI coding agents broke the oldest rule in software engineering — and what actually matters now.
